name: SQLite Explorer
description: Explore your Messages SQLite database to browse tables and inspect schemas with ease. Run flexible
longDescription: SQLite database explorer MCP server with full CRUD operations, custom SQL queries, database exploration and introspection. Provides comprehensive SQLite interaction capabilities.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Show me all tables and their schemas
Query the orders table for this month
Insert a new record into the users table
